has_live_demo.q: Does the product have a live demo URL that works end-to-end (signup or core flow)?

icp_on_hn.q: Is your ICP developers, indie founders, or early-stage SaaS buyers active on HN/IH?

warm_community_check.q: Do you have ≥50 karma-equivalent presence (HN comments, IH posts, or subreddit history)?

aggressive_window.q: Is launch ≥7 days out and Show HN title + first comment drafted?

have_build_log.q: Can you publish a 2-week build log on IH before Show HN?
